name: ClusterCAD Subunit Lookup
description: Retrieve the amino acid sequence, nucleotide sequence, and details for a specific PKS subunit from ClusterCAD using its subunit ID. Use clustercad_get_subunits first to find subunit IDs.

inputs.name: subunit_id
inputs.description: Numeric subunit ID from ClusterCAD (e.g. 24119 for AbsB1 in Abyssomicin). Use clustercad_get_subunits to find valid subunit IDs for a cluster.

outputs.description: Subunit details including 'subunit_id', 'name', 'start', 'stop', 'genbank_accession', 'AAsequence' (amino acid sequence), and 'DNAsequence' (nucleotide sequence).
